title: Dcasse
compiled_truth: Dcasse is an external contact at [Whwg](companies/whwg). Over the corpus period (2000-12-05 to 2001-04-02), Dcasse sent 10 and received 28 emails, totalling 38 interactions. Top correspondents: [Skean](people/skean) (10), [Mpalmer](people/mpalmer) (7), [Rshapiro](people/rshapiro) (7), [Rob Bradley](people/rob-bradley) (1).
